'''Quecks''' was the [[Major/Legends|Major]] of the [[Sentient Property Crime Bureau]] of the [[Phindar Station]]. He was responsible for checking if [[Droid/Legends|droids]] in the [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] were properly licensed. When [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]] and a droid battalion arrived at the spaceport, Quecks ordered the retreat, instead of fighting against the droids.

==Appearances==
*''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'' {{Ab|Yoda: Dark Rendezvous (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
